title: Easy Commands
description: A set of easy-to-use command aliases.
body:
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.20.1-green) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod-v1.0-blue) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Forge/Fabric-orange) A set of easy-to-use command aliases. For Forge and Fabric.
### List of Commands: `/gmc` - Set gamemode to creative. `/gms` - Set gamemode to survival. `/gma` - Set gamemode to adventure. `/gmp` - Set gamemode to spectator. `/easy` - Set difficulty to easy. `/normal` - Set difficulty to normal. `/hard` - Set difficulty to hard. `/peaceful` - Set difficulty to peaceful. `/overworld` - Teleport to the overworld. `/nether` - Teleport to the nether. `/end` - Teleport to the end. `/day` - Set time to day. `/night` - Set time to night. `/rain` - Toggles rain on or off. --- Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks.
